name: Peanut Butter Pie- Key Gourmet
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a graham cracker or chocolate crumb pie crust (9 inches).
2. Beat the cream cheese and peanut butter until smooth.
3. Add the sifted powdered sugar, milk, and beat until well mixed.
4. Fold in the whipped topping and spoon into the pie shell.
5. Chill in the freezer for 15 minutes.
6. Drizzle chocolate syrup on top (optional).
